problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
